mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auction_inquiry ( auction_id, writer_id, answerer_id, title, content, secret_yn, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{auctionId}, #{writerId}, #{answererId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{secretYn}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, auction_id AS auctionId, writer_id AS writerId, answerer_id AS answererId, title, content, answer, status, answered_at AS answeredAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM auction_inquiry WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE auction_inquiry SET answer = #{answer}, answerer_id = #{answererId}, answered_at = #{answeredAt}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT ai.id, ai.writer_id AS writerId, ai.title, ai.content, m.nickname AS writerName, ai.answer, ai.answered_at AS answeredAt, ai.secret_yn AS secretYn, ai.status, ai.created_at AS createdAt FROM auction_inquiry ai LEFT JOIN member m ON ai.writer_id = m.id WHERE ai.auction_id = #{auctionId} ORDER BY ai.created_at DESC
